{{CargoOrgan
|name=Paul II's Tentacle
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10645
|idx=1
|description=After accurately predicting World Cup outcomes one too many times, underground casinos finally bought out the octopus' brain - leaving only these twitching tentacles writhing in prophetic agony...
|skill=Summon Death Tentacle, dealing DMG equal to 136% of ATK, and trigger Tentacle Lash to deal DMG equal to 9% of ATK!
|hp=860
|def=48
|atk=34
|rush=39
|gene1=In explorations, food consumed -5%
|gene2=The Pond has a +3% chance to produce W-tads
|gene7=The Pond has a +3% chance to produce W-tads (Awakened)
|}}
